name: SBI Cards and Payment Services Limited
summary: SBI Cards and Payment Services Limited, a non-banking financial company, issues credit cards to individual and corporate customers in India. It also acts as corporate insurance agent for selling insurance policies to credit card customers. SBI Cards and Payment Services Limited has a strategic partnership with American Express; and partnership agreement with Paytm. The company was formerly known as SBI Cards and Payment Services Private Limited. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Gurugram, India. SBI Cards and Payment Services Limited is a subsidiary of State Bank of India.
